text: There is only one person on skies all along the mountains
A young man removes a home made pizza from the oven.
Woman playing a boxing game on Nintendo Wii.
A fire hydrant in a patch of grass near a sidewalk.
A man is eating a number of sandwiches next to a bottle of water.
A person holding a green plastic knife getting ready to cut a white cake.
A red traffic light sits in front of an olive colored building with many windows.
A tray of food on a table that has a sandwich, beans and a side of mashed potatoes in a bowl.
The young boy is in the yard,  with his hand on his luggage, while adults focus on other things in the back ground
A person holding a copy of the book, "A Good Dog."
